features: Superior Energy Efficiency: Those E14 LED bulb consumes up to 85% less energy than traditional bulbs, providing the same brightness with only 5W power usage, making it a smart choice for any screw-in light fixture
Extended Durability: With a lifespan of up to 15,000 hours, our long-lasting E14 light bulbs reduce the frequency of replacements, providing dependable light year after year
Warm Inviting Glow: Our E14 LED bulb emits a soft, warm white light at 3000K, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere in any room, perfect for relaxing or entertaining
Immediate Brightness: Experience instant full brightness with no delay. Our small light bulb illuminates immediately, making it ideal for fast-paced environments where E14 sockets are used

Flexible Application: Perfect for a wide range of lighting fixtures, this versatile E14 bulb seamlessly integrates into everything from chandeliers and ceiling fans to table lamps, enhancing both utility and style in your space
